Home › Blog › Getting Started with Modern JavaScript

Getting Started with Modern JavaScript

By Jane January 20, 2024 7 min read In Tutorials Tagged: JavaScript, Beginner

JavaScript has evolved significantly over the past decade. In this guide, we cover the essential modern features every developer should know.

ES Modules

ES modules let you organize code into reusable files with import and export statements.

Arrow Functions

const hello = () => console.log('world');

Async/Await

Async/await makes asynchronous code read like synchronous code, reducing callback complexity.
